output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 6/6.
Batch 1: Completed T1. `useShotGroups` now only maps pinned shot groups into renderable `ShotGroup[]`, uses `shots` only for shot-name lookup, removes `isPinned`, and drops all inference/dedup/final-video/debug logic. Static verification passed for the batch scope, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Completed batch 2 tasks `T2` and `T3`. `useShotGroups.test.ts` now covers pinned-only behavior and passes as a full module, and `TimelineEditor.tsx` no longer computes or passes `finalVideoShotIds`, instead using the simplified `useShotGroups(rows, shots, pinnedShotGroups)` call and forwarding `finalVideoMap` to `TimelineCanvas`. Progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Completed batch 3 tasks `T4` and `T6`. `TimelineCanvas.tsx` now treats all shot groups as pinned, derives final-video availability from `finalVideoMap`, removes the dead pin/dismiss/finalVideoShotIds props, and always renders the solid pinned styling with the shot label visible. `useFinalVideoAvailable.ts` now keeps `dismissedFinalVideoIds` internal-only and returns only `finalVideoMap` plus `dismissFinalVideo`. Progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Completed batch 4 task `T5`. `ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx` no longer tracks `isPinned`, no longer exposes pin or dismiss props/actions, and now gates the remaining actions only by `mode` and final-video availability. Progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_4.json`.
Batch 5: Completed batch 5 task `T7`. `TimelineEditor.test.ts` no longer references the deleted final-video helper/types, and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` now asserts the pinned-only canvas/context-menu behavior with `finalVideoMap`. Both full test modules passed, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_5.json`.
Batch 6: Completed batch 6 task `T8`. Final verification passed: the temporary reproduction script confirmed the pinned-only shot-group cleanup surface, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, all three full vitest modules passed, `useShotGroups.ts` remains 58 lines with no `console.log`, and targeted greps found no remaining removed-symbol references in `src/tools/video-editor`. Progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_6.json`.
commands_run: rg -n "Unpin|Switch to Final Video|Switch to Images|menu\.mode !== 'video'|menu\.mode === 'video'" src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx

printf '== removed symbol grep ==
'; rg -n "resolveFinalVideoShotIds|finalVideoShotIds|onShotGroupPin|onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo|isPinned" src/tools/video-editor || true; printf '
== dismissedFinalVideoIds export/return grep ==
'; rg -n "export const dismissedFinalVideoIds|dismissedFinalVideoIds\s*," src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useFinalVideoAvailable.ts || true; printf '
== console.log grep ==
'; rg -n "console\.log" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.ts || true; printf '
== line count ==
'; wc -l src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Simplified `useShotGroups` to map `pinnedShotGroups` directly into `ShotGroup[]` and use `shots` only for shot-name resolution while filtering missing-track and dead-clip entries. Static verification: `wc -l` reports 58 lines, and `rg` confirms no remaining `isPinned`, `finalVideoShotIds`, inference helpers, or `console.log` references in the file. Deferred broader type/test verification to later batches because dependent callers and tests still target the pre-batch signature.

Rewrote `useShotGroups.test.ts` for pinned-only behavior: removed all inference-era coverage, updated the pinned-group assertion to the 3-argument hook signature without `isPinned`, and added edge cases for undefined pinned groups, missing tracks, and dead clip ids. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts` passed with 5/5 tests.

Simplified `TimelineEditor.tsx` by deleting `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, removing the `finalVideoShotIds` memo and `ShotFinalVideo`/dismissed-id wiring, updating `useShotGroups` to the new 3-argument signature, removing the dead pin/dismiss canvas props, and passing `finalVideoMap` through instead. Static verification: grep confirms the removed symbols no longer exist in the file, while the updated `useShotGroups(...)` call and `finalVideoMap={finalVideoMap}` prop are present. Full typecheck is deferred to the later validation batch because `TimelineCanvas` still needs its corresponding prop/interface update in T4.

Updated `TimelineCanvas.tsx` to the pinned-only model: removed the `isPinned`/suggested-group distinction, switched `hasFinalVideo` to `finalVideoMap?.has(group.shotId)`, removed the dead `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, and `onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo` props, and made the group border/top-bar/label styling always use the pinned presentation. Static verification: grep now finds no `isPinned`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, or `onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo` references in `TimelineCanvas.tsx`, and the file contains the new `finalVideoMap` prop surface. Full compile/test verification is deferred to later batches because `ShotGroupContextMenu` behavior and canvas tests are intentionally updated in T5/T7.

Updated `useFinalVideoAvailable.ts` so the module-level `dismissedFinalVideoIds` set is internal-only and no longer returned from the hook, while preserving `finalVideoMap` and `dismissFinalVideo`. The `ShotFinalVideo` re-export was intentionally kept because `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `useSwitchToFinalVideo.ts` still import it before the later test cleanup batch. Static verification: the file now exposes only `finalVideoMap` and `dismissFinalVideo` from the hook, and there is no exported `dismissedFinalVideoIds` symbol.

Simplified `ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx` by removing `isPinned` from `ShotGroupMenuState`, deleting the `onPinGroup` and `onDismissFinalVideo` props, removing the 'Pin as Shot Group' and 'Dismiss reminder' actions, and updating the remaining action gates so Unpin is shown whenever available, Switch to Final Video is shown when `menu.mode !== 'video'`, and Switch to Images is shown when `menu.mode === 'video'`. Static verification: grep finds no remaining `isPinned`, `onPinGroup`, `onDismissFinalVideo`, 'Pin as Shot Group', or 'Dismiss reminder' references in the file, and the new mode-based conditions are present. Full test verification is deferred to T7/T8 because the canvas/test fixtures are updated in that later batch.
commands_run: rg -n "Unpin|Switch to Final Video|Switch to Images|menu\.mode !== 'video'|menu\.mode === 'video'" src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `TimelineEditor.test.ts` to remove the deleted `resolveFinalVideoShotIds` coverage and its `ShotFinalVideo` import. Updated `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` to use `finalVideoMap` instead of `finalVideoShotIds`, removed `onShotGroupPin`, removed `isPinned` from test shot-group fixtures, and rewrote the group/menu expectations to match the pinned-only canvas and context-menu behavior. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts` passed (6 tests), `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` passed (8 tests), and grep found no remaining `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `ShotFinalVideo`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, or `isPinned` references in those two test files. The canvas test run emitted a non-failing `[PERF] render-storm` stderr warning but still passed.

Final verification passed. `npx tsc --noEmit` completed cleanly, the full `useShotGroups`, `TimelineEditor`, and `TimelineCanvas` vitest modules all passed, the temporary reproduction script confirmed the pinned-only shot-group cleanup surface, `useShotGroups.ts` remains 58 lines with no `console.log`, and targeted greps found no remaining `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, `onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo`, or `isPinned` references in `src/tools/video-editor`. `dismissedFinalVideoIds` is no longer exported or returned from `useFinalVideoAvailable.ts`. The `TimelineCanvas` test run still emits the existing non-failing `[PERF] render-storm` stderr warning.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. `useShotGroups` now returns only pinned groups derived from timeline config; inference, gap detection, generation/image ordering, deduplication, and debug logging are gone. The file is 58 lines long.

Confirmed. All inference-related `useShotGroups` tests were removed, the pinned-group test now uses `useShotGroups(rows, shots, pinnedShotGroups)` without `isPinned`, and new coverage was added for undefined pinned groups, missing tracks, and dead clip ids. The full `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts` module passes.

Confirmed. `resolveFinalVideoShotIds` and the `finalVideoShotIds` memo are deleted, `useShotGroups` is now called with the simplified 3-argument signature, and `TimelineEditor` passes `finalVideoMap` to `TimelineCanvas` instead. The matching `TimelineCanvas` prop/interface change is intentionally deferred to T4.

Confirmed. `TimelineCanvas` now renders all shot groups with the solid pinned styling, always shows the shot-name label, derives `hasFinalVideo` from `finalVideoMap`, and grep shows no remaining `isPinned` references in the file.

Confirmed. The module-level `dismissedFinalVideoIds` set is no longer exported, while `dismissFinalVideo` still writes to the internal set and the hook still returns `finalVideoMap` plus `dismissFinalVideo`.

Confirmed. 'Pin as Shot Group' and 'Dismiss reminder' are removed, and the remaining actions are no longer gated on `isPinned`: Unpin depends only on `onUnpinGroup`, Switch to Final Video depends on `menu.hasFinalVideo && menu.mode !== 'video'`, and Switch to Images depends on `menu.mode === 'video'`.

Confirmed. `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` compile and pass without references to the deleted symbols: grep returns no `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `ShotFinalVideo`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, or `isPinned` matches in those two files, and both full vitest modules passed.

Confirmed. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, all three full vitest modules passed, `useShotGroups.ts` is 58 lines with no `console.log`, and targeted greps found no remaining `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, `onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo`, or `isPinned` references anywhere under `src/tools/video-editor`. `dismissedFinalVideoIds` is no longer exported or returned from `useFinalVideoAvailable.ts`.
